items.title: Spotify and Universal Music Strike Deal Allowing Fan-Made AI Covers and Remixes
items.summary: Spotify and Universal Music Group have partnered to permit fan-created AI covers and remixes, signaling a significant shift in music rights and AI integration.

items.title: I/O 2026: Welcome to the Agentic Gemini Era
items.summary: Google's I/O 2026 keynote introduces the 'agentic Gemini era,' highlighting a future where AI agents powered by Gemini play a more autonomous and integrated role.

items.title: Trump Delays AI Security Executive Order, Citing Potential 'Blocker' Language
items.summary: Former President Trump has postponed an AI security executive order, citing concerns that its initial wording might hinder innovation.

items.title: Salesforce Rolls Out New Slackbot AI Agent to Compete in Workplace AI Market
items.summary: Salesforce has launched a new Slackbot AI agent, intensifying its competition with Microsoft and Google in the enterprise workplace AI market.

items.title: Nous Research's NousCoder-14B: An Open-Source Coding Model for the 'Claude Code Moment'
items.summary: Nous Research has released NousCoder-14B, an open-source coding model positioned as a strong competitor in the rapidly evolving AI code generation space.

items.title: Mega-ASR: Scaling Real-world Acoustic Simulation for In-the-wild Speech Recognition
items.summary: Researchers introduce Mega-ASR, a new approach to significantly improve speech recognition in diverse real-world conditions by scaling up acoustic simulation.

items.title: AdventHealth Advances Whole-Person Care with OpenAI Partnership
items.summary: AdventHealth is partnering with OpenAI to integrate AI into its healthcare services, aiming to enhance whole-person care delivery.

items.title: Video2GUI: Synthesizing Large-Scale Interaction Trajectories for Generalized GUI Agent Pretraining
items.summary: A new method, Video2GUI, enables the synthesis of vast interaction data to pretrain AI agents for generalized graphical user interface control.

items.title: Enhancing Train-Free Infinite-Frame Generation for Consistent Long Videos
items.summary: A novel technique allows for the generation of consistent, infinitely long videos without requiring additional training, advancing video synthesis capabilities.

items.title: You Only Need Minimal RLVR Training: Extrapolating LLMs via Rank-1 Trajectories
items.summary: This paper suggests that LLMs can be effectively extrapolated with minimal Reinforcement Learning from Variational Rewards (RLVR) training using rank-1 trajectories.

items.title: OScaR: Occam's Razor for Extreme KV Cache Quantization in LLMs and Beyond
items.summary: OScaR introduces an extreme KV cache quantization method for LLMs, significantly reducing memory footprint while maintaining performance.

items.title: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore: Fostering AI Innovation in the Region
items.summary: OpenAI is expanding its presence and services into Singapore, marking a strategic move to foster AI innovation and adoption in the region.

items.title: Building a Database Performance Testing Tool With AI: The Honest Breakdown
items.summary: An article details the practical challenges and insights gained from developing an AI-powered tool for database performance testing.

items.title: IndusAgent: Reinforcing Open-Vocabulary Industrial Anomaly Detection with Agentic Tools
items.summary: IndusAgent proposes using agentic tools to enhance open-vocabulary industrial anomaly detection, improving robustness and adaptability in manufacturing.

items.title: A Survey of Large Audio Language Models: Generalization, Trustworthiness, and Outlook
items.summary: A comprehensive survey explores the current state, challenges, and future directions of Large Audio Language Models, focusing on generalization and trustworthiness.
